{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged circle of madra
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Forged circle of madra]] can be used as a sample of a customer's [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
